name: Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275°F (135°C).
2. Separate the eggs, placing the yolks in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites, mixing gently until combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased pie plate and make a hollow in the center.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 275°F (135°C), or until the custard is set but not browned on top.
7. In another bowl, beat 4 egg yolks with half the sugar, lemon juice, and rind until smooth.
8. Cook this mixture over a double boiler until it thickens slightly.
9. Allow the filling to cool completely.
10. Whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
11. When the filling is cooled, add half of the whipped cream into the pie shell.
12. Add the remaining filling and top with the rest of the whipped cream.
13. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
